text.title: STAR Question Bank by Competency
text.summary: STAR question bank across five core competencies with probing follow-ups per question.

list.item: "Tell me about a time you led a team through a significant change." → Probe: "What resistance did you encounter and how did you handle it?"
"Describe a situation where you had to motivate an underperforming team member." → Probe: "What was the outcome for that person 3 months later?"
"Give an example of when you made an unpopular decision." → Probe: "What would you do differently in hindsight?"
"Tell me about a time you had to delegate an important task." → Probe: "How did you ensure quality without micromanaging?"
"Describe a complex problem you solved at work." → Probe: "Walk me through your decision-making process at the hardest moment."
"Tell me about a time you had to make a decision with incomplete information." → Probe: "What would have changed if you had waited for more data?"
"Give an example of when you identified a problem before others noticed." → Probe: "How did you validate that it was actually a problem?"
"Describe a time you had to troubleshoot under pressure." → Probe: "How did you manage your own stress while solving it?"
"Tell me about a time you had to deliver difficult news to stakeholders." → Probe: "What was their reaction and how did you manage it?"
"Describe a situation where you had to persuade someone who disagreed." → Probe: "What argument ultimately changed their position?"
"Give an example of when you had to explain something complex simply." → Probe: "How did you know they truly understood?"
"Tell me about a miscommunication and how you resolved it." → Probe: "What systemic change did you make to prevent recurrence?"
"Describe a successful cross-functional project you contributed to." → Probe: "What was YOUR specific contribution vs. the team's?"
"Tell me about a time you had a conflict with a colleague." → Probe: "How is your relationship with that person today?"
"Give an example of when you had to work with someone whose style differed from yours." → Probe: "What did you adapt and what did you hold firm on?"
"Tell me about a time you had to adapt to a major change at work." → Probe: "What was the hardest part of the adjustment?"
"Describe a situation where priorities suddenly shifted." → Probe: "What did you do about work you had already committed to?"
"Tell me about a time you failed and how you responded." → Probe: "What specifically would you do differently?"

text.reference: Scorecard template with per-question S/T/A/R evidence fields.
Before/during/after interview checklist for hiring managers.
